metadata.reference: A. D. Rakić. Algorithm for the determination of intrinsic optical constants of metal films: application to aluminum. Appl. Opt. 34, 4755-4767 (1995)
metadata.comments: \Optical and electron-energy-loss data for evaporated-aluminum films have been critically analyzed and used in an iterative, self-consistent algorithm that represents a combination of the Kramers-Kronig analysis and the semiquantum-model application.""
